title: Gradient
description: Animated soft-light gradient with 3 drifting color stops

title: Dot Sphere
description: Animated spherical fibonacci dot pattern on a rotating sphere

title: Water
description: TDM Seascape — procedural ocean with volumetric waves

title: Etherea
description: Cycling font styles per letter with 18 visual patterns

title: Wave
description: Sine displacement per letter with shadow

title: Cascade
description: Tiled rows with wave offsets and alternating colors

title: Digifade
description: Glitch dissolve with horizontal slice displacement

title: Coil
description: Text on spiral rings with 4 shape variants

title: Flag
description: Waving flag surface with 4 wave variants

title: Bricks
description: Grid with animated displacement and 3 pattern variants

title: Spacy
description: Perspective tunnel rows with 4 depth variants

title: 3D Type
description: Layered depth text with parallax perspective, hue gradients, and breathing animation

title: Tesseract
description: 4D hypercube — 16 vertices and 32 edges rotating through four-dimensional space, projected to 3D

title: Shape
description: Rotating geometric shapes with adjustable speed, color, and size. Import your own 3D model.

title: ASCII Matrix
description: Falling columns of ASCII characters — matrix rain with density-mapped glyphs

title: Typewriter
description: Typewriter — characters appear one by one with a blinking cursor

title: ASCII Rain
description: Falling columns of your custom message text — matrix rain using your words

title: Laser
description: RGB laser globe — swirling neon light blobs with separate R/G/B interference patterns

title: Bars
description: Animated gradient bars with 30 easing functions, adjustable columns and phase

title: Fluid Pixels
description: Dynamic pixel grid with procedural simplex noise, 3-stop color ramp, and 4 noise styles

title: Color Cube
description: Morphing 3D shape — box, prism, torus, knots with refraction and mouse orbit

title: Electricity
description: Electric arc — simplex noise plasma with glowing discharge line

title: Robot Arm
description: 2-link inverse kinematics robot arm — follows hand tracking or mouse, pinch to grip

title: La Bloom
description: Never-ending love letter — multi-line text reveals char by char, blooms with warm glow, lingers, dissolves, loops infinitely

title: Balls
description: Metallic spheres with selective Unreal-style bloom — raymarched icosahedron-like balls orbiting in 3D with mouse camera and audio reactivity

title: Particles
description: 75K instanced billboard particles — rainbow HSL cloud with quaternion rotation, sine-wave pulsing, and orbiting camera

title: Lightning
description: Recursive black hole — fractal tiled glow rings with cosine palette, depth iterations, mouse warp, and audio reactivity

title: Cube Explosion
description: Audio-reactive exploding cube grid — 276 cubes with beat detection, bass pump, and scatter physics

title: Dispersion
description: Chromatic dispersion — refractive color separation driven by animated flow noise, with texture input

title: Ether
description: Volumetric light tendrils with rotating space distortion and layered glow

title: Trapped
description: Squishy deformable balls bouncing inside a glass box with PBR shading and inverse metaball squishing

title: Red Carpet
description: Carbon-fiber 2x2 weave geometry rendered as deep red velvet — oxblood/crimson warp-and-weft, anisotropic fiber-streak specular, pile shimmer, slow light drift

title: Carbon Fiber
description: Woven carbon fiber fabric with silk sheen, mouse deformation, and audio-reactive shimmer

title: Rainbow Flower
description: Layered petal rings with simplex noise, hue cycling, spinning, depth, bloom, and audio reactivity

title: ISF+3D (POC)
description: Phase 1 proof of concept — ISF metaballs shader running inside Three.js via RawShaderMaterial alongside a 3D torus knot, composited in the same WebGL context

title: Fluid+3D (Phase2)
description: Phase 2 — 8-pass Navier-Stokes fluid simulation running in Three.js via ISFThreeRuntime with ping-pong WebGLRenderTargets

title: Laser Labyrinth
description: Volumetric laser beams through fog

title: Metamorphosis
description: Raymarched morphing metallic metaballs

title: Crystal Cubes
description: Floating rotating glass cubes — bass pulses size, texture revealed through faces

title: Geometric Tunnel
description: Fly-through polygon tunnel — video on walls, neon edges, bass pulses walls

title: CFD Paint
description: Computational fluid dynamics — ink-in-water swirling paint with specular lighting

title: Mirror Fractal
description: Recursive mirror folds — iterative reflections that create fractal kaleidoscope patterns

title: Raining Spheres
description: Bouncing colored light-emitting spheres on an infinite grid with shadows and reflections

title: Data Sculpture
description: Raymarched grid of thousands of cubes flowing like fluid — input an image or video and it sculpts into a 3D data landscape

title: Liquid Metal
description: Bismuth-like liquid metal — rotational CFD with environmental reflection, mouse-interactive, audio-reactive

title: Fluid Image
description: UV-advection fluid sim — warp any image/video with fluid dynamics, image stays crisp and returns when fluid settles

title: Oil Paint
description: Oil paint brush effect — multi-layer brush strokes with relief lighting and vignette

title: ASCII Filter
description: ASCII art filter — converts any image/video to colored ASCII characters with ANSI palette matching

title: Polka Dotz
description: Polka dot pixel tiles — flipping mosaic that reveals image through animated circular pixels with specular highlights

title: Pretext
description: Variable typographic ASCII — particle-driven brightness field rendered with variable font weight characters via @chenglou/pretext

title: Flow
description: Gravity streams — particle gravity simulation with glowing trails, deferred lighting, and texture-mapped streams

title: Soph Orb
description: Soft 3D gradient orb with drifting color stops, rim glow, and optional wireframe ground grid — four pickable colors

title: Edges
description: Particle field bouncing off screen edges with vortex perturbation. Grid-seeded, audio-reactive, velocity-stretched streaks.

title: Memphis Primitives
description: Sottsass / Memphis Group postcard come alive — checkered grids, polka dots, primary triangles rearranging on the beat. Bauhaus + Memphis 1981 colour discipline, no gradients.

title: Sound Temple
description: Octagonal sound temple — eight frequency bands circle you in synchronised pulses. Designed for multi-channel installations where light orbits the listener like a Turrell apse.

title: Turrell Chroma
description: Breathing volume of pure colour-light — almost no motion, just slow chromatic drift. Architectural light, not screen content. Aten Reign / Skyspace.

title: Op-Art Riley Waves
description: Dense black-and-white parallel waves bending and swimming until your eyes refuse to focus. Bridget Riley Op-Art that breathes with the music.

title: Chladni Figures
description: Sand on a vibrating plate. Audio frequencies sculpt classic Chladni nodal lines into living constellations. 1787 plate physics rendered as light.

title: Hologram Glitch
description: A signal trying to hold itself together — scanlines, RGB shift, vertical tear, EMI bursts. Blade Runner 2049 + Nam June Paik.

title: Solar Flare Corona
description: Looking at the sun. Convective surface roils, magnetic ropes arc off the limb in fiery loops, the corona flares with the music.

title: Art Nouveau (Mucha)
description: Sinuous whiplash tendrils flowing over a pastel cream/rose/sage field, framing an oval portrait that breathes with audio. Decorative, ornamental — after Mucha c.1900.

title: Fauvism (Matisse)
description: Pure unmodulated colour blocks slammed against each other — hot pink water, orange masts, lime sky. After Matisse 1905, Derain 1906. Joy as a colour wheel.

title: Expressionism (Kirchner)
description: Jagged Worley warp + acid LUT + ink-line edges — Berlin street through nervous breakdown. After Kirchner Potsdamer Platz (1914) and Munch.

title: Futurism (Boccioni)
description: Stylized humanoid SDF stutter-cloned along a velocity vector — true Futurist motion phases (lines of force) without frame-feedback. Force rays burst from a wandering origin; divisionist dabs streak the wake; warm sienna palette; lateral camera pan. After Dynamism of a Cyclist (1913) and Unique Forms of Continuity in Space (1913).

title: Constructivism (Lissitzky)
description: Red wedge slamming a white circle on cream paper, with diagonal black bars and Cyrillic-stencil glyph clusters. Beat the Whites with the Red Wedge (1919).

title: Dada (Höch)
description: Photomontage — irregular patches of input video at random angles and scales, halftoned, on warm paper, with red ink stamps. Cut with the Dada Kitchen Knife (1919).

title: Action Painting (Pollock)
description: All-over drip skein — N drippers wander via curl-noise advection, depositing thick paint to a persistent buffer that fades slowly. Black, white, silver, cadmium red on raw canvas. After Pollock Number 1A (1948).

title: Cubism (Picasso)
description: Picasso analytic phase — N translucent rectangular planes alpha-stacked, each rotated and sampling the source from its own viewpoint with per-plane gradient shading. Near-monochrome ochre. After Portrait of Kahnweiler (1910) and Ma Jolie (1912).

title: De Stijl (Boogie Woogie)
description: Mondrian's Broadway Boogie Woogie — orthogonal lanes carrying marching coloured pulses, bright primary squares glowing at intersections. No subdivision tree, no Voronoi.

title: Bauhaus (Kandinsky)
description: Kandinsky Composition VIII / Several Circles — geometric SDF primitives floating on white, strict colour-shape pairing (yellow=triangle, red=square, blue=circle), Lissajous orbits with weighted-circle halos.

title: Minimalism (Stella)
description: Frank Stella concentric Chebyshev rings with 4 palette presets and shape modes (square/diamond/hexagon). What you see is what you see.

title: Color Field (Rothko)
description: Rothko Orange Red Yellow / Chapel — stacked Gaussian-blurred rectangles on coloured ground, deeply feathered edges, slow shimmer. Audio influence hard-capped.

title: Surrealism (Magritte)
description: Magritte Empire of Light / Golconda — procedural sky with illustrative clouds, floating SDF object (apple/bowler/rock/pipe), long hard-light shadow, ghost duplicates on bass.

title: Op Art (Vasarely)
description: Vasarely Vega series — concentric ribbed rings warped by spherical bulge, two-tone hue rotation across canvas. Pure radial-phase modulation, no checkerboard.

title: Pop Art (Lichtenstein)
description: Lichtenstein Whaam! / Drowning Girl — input posterized to comic primaries, Ben-Day dot grid replaces shadow zone, thick black outlines, speech bubble flashes sound-word on bass.

title: Vaporwave (Floral Shoppe)
description: Macintosh Plus Floral Shoppe — pink/teal sky, perspective grid floor receding to vanishing point, sun with bars, marble bust SDF, scanlines, katakana, CRT bloom.

title: Glitch / Datamosh
description: Frame-feedback datamosh — buffer pulled along motion vectors, per-row tear, RGB channel split, 8x8 DCT-block corruption, burst rainbow garbage on bass. Menkman / Murata / JODI tradition.

title: Geometric
description: Geometric planet with procedural surface patterns

title: Stained Glass
description: Stained glass â€” adaptive Voronoi subdivision with glass refraction, 3D lead cames, and backlit luminance

title: Squares
description: Cellular Voronoi noise with drifting centers, isolines, and two-tone coloring

title: Veroni 3
description: 3D glass Voronoi sphere â€” morphing panels with neon gradient edges, refraction, image texture, and color control

title: Shatter Grid
description: Mirror-tile grid that explodes on bass â€” each tile reveals a piece of the texture

title: Sonoluminescence
description: Sonoluminescence â€” glowing bubble in water with concentric ripples, glass vessel, and audio-reactive pulse

title: Swirl Spin
description: Moving Lissajous spot painted into a slowly-rotating feedback field. Ported from Shadertoy XsyGzz.

title: Reverse Flow Field
description: Colored seeds streaked backward through an animated cellular flow. Looks like wind-blown grass tips. Ported from Shadertoy X3BBD1.

title: Interactive Particles
description: 1024 particles attracted to a center point and the cursor. Click and drag to pull them around. Ported from Shadertoy McXXzH.

title: Vaporwave Hologram 3D
description: Twin suns sinking into a Tron grid horizon with 3-5 raymarched chrome SDF primitives (sphere, cube, pyramid, torus) drifting on independent orbits. Hot pink → magenta → indigo sky. HDR sun discs and grid lines, sun reflections off chrome, scanlines, chromatic aberration. Single-pass linear HDR.

title: Basic Shapes 3D
description: Reference 3D scene — raymarched SDF primitives (sphere, cube, pyramid, torus, capsule) on a turntable. Selectable lighting model: Studio / Cinematic / Painterly / Neon. Depth fog. Foundation template for all future 3D shaders in Easel.

title: Volumetric Clouds 3D
description: Volumetric raymarched clouds — single-scatter integration through procedural noise field. Beer-Lambert extinction, Henyey-Greenstein phase, sun + sky gradient. Bass swells density.

title: Audio Particles 3D
description: 1024 procedurally-positioned particles in 3D. Each pixel evaluates nearest particles for metaball-style proximity glow. Bass/mid/high drive curl, size, and tint.

title: PBR Reference 3D
description: Physically-based reference template — Cook-Torrance GGX BRDF, Schlick Fresnel, energy-conserving direct + IBL on raymarched SDF scene. Copy this for any 3D shader needing physical look.

title: PBR Glass Dispersion 3D
description: Refractive crystal sculpture with per-channel index of refraction — prism-style chromatic dispersion through SDF glass over a colored grid floor. Fresnel mix between reflected sky and refracted floor; specular highlight + rim halo. Audio modulates twist + dispersion.

title: Prism Basilica
description: Gothic cathedral interior — pointed-arch window emits HDR sun core with per-channel chromatic dispersion through stained-glass panes. Volumetric god-rays sweep cobalt/ruby/emerald/gold beams; ink tracery silhouette; refracted color pools wash the floor. Audio bass pulses sun, mid sways rays, treble sparkles dust motes.

title: Inkwash Dragon
description: Sumi-e mountain landscape — calligraphic black ink dragon coils through layered fog past three painted ridges; HDR sun disk burns through bone-white sky; gold-leaf eye and vermillion seal punctuate. Audio bass tremors the mountain, mid coils the dragon, treble flares the sun.

title: Cymatic Oracle
description: First-person view inside an octagonal marble temple. Eight ink-veined columns ring a central water bowl whose surface ripples with Bessel cymatic modes driven by audio bass/mid/treble. A single HDR oculus beam strikes the water and throws moving caustics across column bases.

title: Chat
description: Speech-bubble note taker. Splits the message into chunks and emits each chunk as a small chat bubble that floats up the screen, alternating sender/receiver sides. New bubble spawns at the bottom every interval; old bubbles drift up and fade.

title: Stream
description: Multi-lane horizontal scrolling text. Each lane shows the message repeating endlessly with parallax speeds, vertical sway, edge fade, and HDR halo. Bind a Background Layer to put the stream over any other shader.

title: Clusters
description: Text-in-metaball-cells. Each chunk of the message lives in a circle; circles within a cluster fuse via smooth-min into organic blobs. New clusters keep spawning across the canvas, popping in and fading out so the composition keeps evolving. Two-color palette with auto contrast.

title: Pixel Players
description: Pixelated morphing face icons that always wear the same little white-rect eyes with shifting black pupils. Cycle palettes, archetypes, and gaze. Audio-reactive scale, color drift, and rare sparkle flecks.

title: Challah
description: 3D braided challah loaf — 3 to 6 strands woven around a central axis, golden crust with optional sesame seeds, smooth end-cap rolls, orbiting camera. Audio drives loaf swelling, braid spin, and high-frequency glaze shimmer.

title: Diamond
description: A field of brilliant-cut diamonds tumbling through space. Each gem spins on its own axis while rainbow light fractures through the facets. Sweeping studio highlights race across the surfaces and the camera arcs in and out, slamming forward on bass hits.

title: Nyc
description: NYC — procedural 3D city flythrough. Raymarched building grid with lit windows and LED ad walls (ad1/ad2/ad3 sample user textures). Time of day, mood, speed, drive/fly height, variety, ad brightness all exposed.

title: American Flag
description: American Flag — 13 stripes + 50-star canton with billowing wind, fabric shading, and audio-reactive gusts

title: Blobscillator
description: based on https://www.shadertoy.com/view/MlKXWm by cacheflowe.  A wannabe reaction-diffusion, but not at all :-P

title: Body Fluid
description: Body Fluid — liquid metal that clings to your skeleton. Fluid is attracted toward body bones, forming a moving liquid figure. Optimized for pose tracking.

title: Bricks Text
description: Screen-filling grid of text with animated per-character wave displacement

title: Cascade Text
description: Screen-filling rows of text with cascading horizontal wave offsets

title: Checkers
description: Checkers — audio-reactive 3D checkerboard with metallic or gradient palettes, bevel lighting, brushed noise, and optional texture on tiles

title: Coil Text
description: Text arranged along a spiral/coil path with rotating colored ring bands

title: Color Picker
description: Soap Bubble Iridescence — 3D raymarched glass sphere with thin-film rainbow interference. Hue sweeps around the surface with viewing angle; HDR specular peaks on twin glints. Calm orbital camera. LINEAR HDR out, no tonemap.

title: Coral Reef
description: Underwater coral reef — branching coral skeletons in coral pink/yellow/purple, schooling fish particles weaving between them, sunbeam caustics from above, gentle current sway. Bass triggers coordinated fish-school direction reversal; treble shimmers caustics.

title: Cymatics Chladni
description: Cymatics — sand on a vibrating plate. True Chladni eigenmodes of a square plate (sin(mπx)sin(nπy) ± sin(nπx)sin(mπy)) driven by FFT bins: bass swells macro lobes, mids carve crosshatch, treble shatters into fine grids. Three-mode interference produces nodal lines (sand) and antinodes (sand-jumping fizz). Plate disc rotates with bevel and Tyndall haze drift outside.

title: Digifade Text
description: Text with animated digital glitch dissolve effect

title: Fisheye Sphere
description: 3D Fisheye Sphere — glass ball centered on screen (diameter locked to screen height) that refracts the source image/layer below with chromatic dispersion

title: Flag Text
description: Text on a waving flag surface with 3D shading and presets

title: Flip Board
description: Solari split-flap departures board — grid of mechanical flap cells animating between glyphs with the iconic mid-flip blur. Cells stagger their flips so the board 'wakes' row-by-row when a new message arrives. Audio-bass triggers a fresh flip cycle; the board feels alive and busy. Yellow-on-charcoal is the canonical Solari di Udine palette.

title: Fluid Body
description: Fluid Body — organic fluid simulation with chromatic aberration, color rotation, and audio-reactive momentum. Inspired by Synesthesia's Fluid Body.

title: Fog Machine
description: Volumetric fog machine — domain-warped fbm rolling forward, with an optional input texture sampled through the warp so the image itself becomes the fog. Audio-reactive density pulse on bass.

title: Gradient Example
description: Volumetric gradient — two-stop color sampled through a 3D fbm noise field. Camera flies through the field giving depth and parallax. Bright crests punch into HDR (linear). Audio drives flow speed and crest intensity. Output linear HDR.

title: Holographic Foil
description: Combined holographic / glitch shader. Four modes stack the best techniques from datamosh (persistent moshBuf frame-feedback + I-frame stutter + per-row tear + 8x8 DCT block corruption + RGB chroma split + bass burst garbage), hologram (scan-bar + cyan tint + parallax tilt + horizontal interlace), and foil (diffraction-grating rainbow palette + sparkle cells + paper grain + four foil patterns: linear / radial / crystal / glitter). Mode 3 stacks all three at lower intensity for a Pokemon-card-on-fire look.

title: Ink In Water
description: Drops of colored ink dispersing through clear water — curl-noise advected blooms with branching tendrils, slow rotational vortex, and pigment density decreasing as it spreads. Audio bass triggers new ink drops at hashed positions; treble drives fine turbulence detail. The Sunday-afternoon kitchen experiment as music visualizer.

title: James
description: Animated text with cycling font styles per letter

title: Layers Text
description: Text repeated at multiple depth layers with parallax and scale

title: Lightning Storm
description: High-fidelity branching forked lightning bolts with continuous polyline SDF, hot core + cyan plasma sheath, stochastic Brownian forks, parallax stormcloud layers, diagonal rain streaks, screen flash with chromatic aberration, ground silhouette, bloom, grain, and vignette. Bass triggers strikes, mids amplify the storm, highs shimmer the clouds.

title: Liquid Ripples 3d
description: Sound made literally visible — concentric ripples rolling across stacked depth-planes, audio frequencies sculpting cymatic interference patterns in 3D space.

title: Mandelbrot Zoom
description: Infinite Mandelbrot set zoom on a curated path of interesting points (sea-horse valley, elephant valley, mini-Mandelbrot near 0.286+0.011i). Smooth iteration count for continuous colour, audio-driven palette rotation, and zoom speed responds to bass. Pure mathematics as light show

title: Marble
description: Marble — swirling wisps with custom texture vein color

title: Matrix Rain
description: Wachowski Matrix code rain — vertical columns of bright green pseudo-glyphs falling at column-specific speeds, leading head-glyph blown out white, trailing characters fading to dark green. Random glyph mutation per frame so the code reads as live data. Audio-reactive: bass spawns new columns, treble accelerates the fall.

title: Meteor Shower
description: Perseid-style radiant meteor shower — bright streaks of varying intensity radiating outward from a single radiant point in the sky, with persistent twinkling stars, milky-way band, and audio-bass triggering bright fireball bolides. Each meteor has a hot leading edge and a glowing trail that fades, plus occasional rare sub-branching

title: Moveable Gradient
description: Moves a multicolor (up to 5) gradient across the view from and to off view

title: Multi Gradient
description: Your shader description

title: Multi Layer Particles
description: Multi-GPU Tiled Particles — spatial tiling for multi-GPU projection. Each GPU renders a tile of a larger virtual canvas. All particles exist in the full space; each GPU sees its slice. 3 GPUs at 832x480 = 2496x480 seamless output.

title: Oil Slick Iridescence
description: Thin-film interference colours on a flowing surface — rainbow patches that shift hue as the film thickness varies, computed from real Fresnel-ish thin-film equations. Like a soap bubble or oil-on-water in slow flow, with audio-driven thickness modulation

title: Particle Galaxy
description: Spiral galaxy disc with N rotating star particles plotted along log-spiral arms. Stars get blue-O type at the disc outskirts and yellow-G type near the bulge. Bass kicks ignite supernova flashes; treble drives nebular gas glow. Bulge is a hot warm-tinted core; halo is a faint diffuse Hubble-deep-field star field

title: Particle Grid
description: Perfect rectangular constellation; every cell bound to one FFT bin, bass at left, treble at right, breathing in unison. Kraftwerk + Ryoji Ikeda data.matrix.

title: Particles
description: 3D instanced billboard particles — rainbow HSL cloud orbiting in perspective

title: Pen Ink
description: Pen & ink stylizer — converts an input image (or generates a procedural tone) into pen-and-ink illustration. Four modes: Cross-Hatch, Stippling, Contour, Sumi-e Brush. Input texture luminance drives line density. Bass thickens strokes, treble adds spatter. Inspired by Shadertoy XlKBzc.

title: Pool Caustics
description: Underwater caustic light patterns — focused sun rays refracting through wave-rippled water and projecting bright dancing curves onto a tile floor below. Real-pool aesthetic with cyan tint, slow drift, audio-bass driving wave amplitude. Hypnotic, calming, instantly recognisable

title: Prism Dispersion
description: White-light beam striking a triangular glass prism and splitting into a continuous rainbow spectrum on the other side — Snell's law refraction with wavelength-dependent index gives the iconic Pink Floyd Dark Side cover. The beam can be redirected by audio bass; treble shifts the dispersion factor

title: Random Freeze
description: Volcanic Caldera — 3D raymarched molten lava landscape. Domain-warped FBM terrain with glowing obsidian rock and HDR lava channels flowing through deep rifts. Camera orbits the caldera rim at dusk. LINEAR HDR out, no tonemap.

title: Shine Text
description: Text with moving highlight sweep — chrome-like shine effect

title: Sketchpad
description: SketchPad — animated sketch on paper: rough circles, drifting lines/rectangles, scribble hatching, with outline or filled-color modes and halftone screen-print overlap blending

title: Solar Terminator
description: Earth from orbit — rotating globe with day/night terminator line, city lights blooming across the dark side, atmospheric scattering halo at the limb. Bass kicks accelerate rotation, treble drives auroras at the poles. The blue-marble shot every space film loves

title: Spacy Text
description: Rows of text at varying depth scales creating a perspective tunnel effect

title: Stellar Nursery
description: A star-forming nebula like Carina or Orion — pillars of dust with hot young stars igniting inside, ionised hydrogen glowing red, oxygen glowing teal, with subtle dust-lane occlusion. Bass triggers proto-star ignition events that flash and persist as new bright pinpoints

title: Terminal Ticker
description: Bloomberg / Reuters terminal — multiple horizontal lanes of scrolling stock-ticker glyphs, real numerals for prices, up/down delta arrows in green/red, and a market-crash glitch on bass kicks where rows desync, flicker red, and corrupt pixel-blocks. CRT phosphor green on charcoal, with a bottom-row volume waveform.

title: Text 3d
description: 3D extruded text — rotating block letters with Phong lighting and cycling fill patterns

title: Text Matrix
description: Matrix rain — falling character columns with embedded message text

title: Text Unified
description: Unified text effects - 21 presets across 9 effect families with 3 bitmap fonts + variable font

title: Time Glitch Rgbfs
description: Neon Circuit Board — 3D raymarched PCB surface. SDF circuit traces (copper extrusions) on dark substrate, RGB data pulses traveling along horizontal and vertical routes. Low-angle orbit camera. LINEAR HDR out, no tonemap.

title: Untitled Shader
description: Gradient Flow forked from https://www.shadertoy.com/view/wdyczG

title: Vishes
description: Crystal Cave Formations — 3D raymarched cave interior with hexagonal emerald and amethyst crystal columns growing from floor and ceiling. Cinematic low-angle camera slowly drifts through the cavern. LINEAR HDR out, no tonemap.

title: Volumetric Led
description: Volumetric LED display simulator - audio-reactive 3D voxel grid, raymarched. Adapted from cytonomy/volumetric-led.

title: Wave Interference
description: Wave Interference Field — Multiple point-source ripples on a water surface — concentric wavefronts radiating from N sources, summing constructively + destructively into shimmering moiré patterns. Bass kicks add new sources at hashed positions; treble shortens wavelength; the grid is a real PHYSICAL standing-wave field.

title: Wave Text
description: Text waving like a flag — sine wave displacement per letter

title: Geo
description: Geo — 2D path-traced circle-circle intersection. Two orbiting circles compute their algebraic intersection points in real time; a 68-sample radial path tracer accumulates global illumination across the canvas. Ported from Yusef28 Shadertoy 7l2XDm.
